name: Okta: Privileged Users without MFA (Direct)
description: Users who do not have multi-factor authentication enabled and directly hold privileged role assignments.
query:
MATCH path = (user:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE user.authenticationFactors = 0
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
